title: Remove dead code, TODOs, worker comments from lichen-rpl and lichen-node
description: Scan lichen-rpl/, lichen-node/ for TODO, worker comments, dead code related to trickle/RPL. Remove all. Ensure no_std compliance everywhere.
notes: Fixed duplicate trickle_from_config fn and deprecated send_ipv6_raw in lichen-node; cleaned unused var silencing comment in scheduler.rs. Removed 22 lines of dead code. Commit: 9c690ab75
